news.t: 6 Consumer Stocks For a Growing Economy

holdings.infoBox: RSPD is an equity ETF with a total of 50 individual holdings. The top holdings are MGM Resorts International stock at 2.71%, Marriott International at 2.53%, Ralph Lauren at 2.49%, Williams-Sonoma at 2.49%, and eBay Inc. at 2.46%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight Consumer Discretionary ETF (RSPD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of large-cap US Consumer Discretionary stocks drawn from the S&P 500. RSPD was launched on Nov 1, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: 6 Consumer Stocks For a Growing Economy
data.text: GDP is still growing, and falling inflation could mean more money for consumers to spend.
